nasb.text: “But if the scab spreads farther on the skin after he has shown himself to the priest for his cleansing, he shall appear again to the priest.

esv.text: But if the eruption spreads in the skin, after he has shown himself to the priest for his cleansing, he shall appear again before the priest.

cnv.text: 但是祭司察看，宣布他潔淨以後，癬若是在皮上蔓延，他就要再次給祭司察看。

ccb.text: 如果祭司已查看并宣布他是洁净的，但皮疹又扩散，他必须再去见祭司。
